title: Neutral Customer - Wants to Cancel Subscription
description: A customer is calling to cancel their premium subscription because they no longer use the service.
background_context: The customer has been subscribed for 6 months but hasn't logged in for the last 2 months. They want to cancel before their renewal next week. They are open to staying if there's a significant discount or a pause option.
success_criteria: Ask polite probing questions to understand why
Offer an alternative like pausing the account or a discount
Process the cancellation smoothly if they decline the offer
common_mistakes: Being overly pushy to retain them
Failing to ask why they are leaving
